title: pyrus samsoniana
intro: Pyrus samsoniana is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, commonly known as the Korean mountain pear or Chinese mountain pear. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues and relieve symptoms of fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Pyrus samsoniana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce stress and improve overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Pyrus samsoniana include dried fruits, leaves, and bark, which can be used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
